heading: Accelerated approval Council
label: 356–2 Accelerated approval Council

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall establish an intra-agency coordinating council (referred to in this subsection as the “Council”) within the Food and Drug Administration to ensure the consistent and appropriate use of accelerated approval across the Food and Drug Administration, pursuant to .December 29, 2022section 356(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The Director of the Center for Drug Evaluation and Research.

children.label: B
children.text: The Director of the Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research.

children.label: C
children.text: The Director of the Oncology Center of Excellence.

children.label: D
children.text: The Director of the Office of New Drugs.

children.label: E
children.text: The Director of the Office of Orphan Products Development.

children.label: F
children.text: The Director of the Office of Tissues and Advanced Therapies.

children.label: G
children.text: The Director of the Office of Medical Policy.

children.label: H
children.text: At least 3 directors of review divisions or offices overseeing products approved under accelerated approval, including at least one director within the Office of Neuroscience.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: A Meetings
children.text: The Council shall convene not fewer than 3 times per calendar year to discuss issues related to accelerated approval, including any relevant cross-disciplinary approaches related to product review with respect to accelerated approval.

children.label: i
children.text: developing guidance for Food and Drug Administration staff and best practices for, and across, product review teams, including with respect to communication between sponsors and the Food and Drug Administration and the review of products under accelerated approval;

children.label: ii
children.text: providing training for product review teams; and

children.label: iii
children.text: advising review divisions on best practices with respect to product-specific development, review, and withdrawal of products under accelerated approval.

children.heading: Publication of a report
children.label: 4 Publication of a report
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , and annually thereafter, the Council shall publish on the public website of the Food and Drug Administration a report on the activities of the Council.December 29, 2022
